query:
SELECT u.email, u.name, sr.name as roleName 
FROM users u 
JOIN userSystemRoles usr ON u.id = usr.userId 
JOIN systemRoles sr ON usr.roleId = sr.id 
WHERE sr.name = 'Requestor' 
LIMIT 1;
